name: horsim
documentation:
# Horsle
[![Build Status](https://app.travis-ci.com/JKiran4/Horse-Race-Simulator.svg?token=puGRmUsVeyZRKzqBrQKR&branch=main)](https://app.travis-ci.com/JKiran4/Horse-Race-Simulator)

Note that the coverage for betting is very low as it relies on all of the other modules to function - to make it sure it has coverage it would require us to overhaul our current test suite

Required libraries: turtle, time, pandas, random, datetime

Executing the test file should run the whole program. Make sure runs.csv is in the downlaoded package.

Note that the race will only run once, but for added functionality, we may change the simulation library (turtle) so we can run games repeatedly without closing the program. Also, note that Macs have issues with the turtle library displaying the race, but it should still execute the program.

horse_race_simulator/ # package  

race_data/ #subpackage1
- horse_stats.py
  - __init__(self, horse_id, horse_age, actual_weight, horse_type, horse_rating, jockey_id): initialization
  - create_horse(csv_filename): creates horse stats from data set
  - update_horse_stats(self): updates horse speed based on horse stats
  - get_horse_info(self): display horses stats
- track_data.py
  - __init__(self): initialization
  - create_track(self): randomly selects track venue and corresponding race distance
  - weather_factors(self): randomly selects weather factors to apply to race, which adjusts horse speed 
  - get_track_info(self): displays track information
- race_details.py
  - __init__(self num_horses = 5): initialization
  - set_date(self, date): adjusts race date
  - get_race_info(self): displays race_id, date, venue, distance, prize, and number of horses


simulation/ #subpackage2  
- race_simulator.py
  - __init__(self, race, track): initialization
  - draw_track(self, scaled_length): creates track imagery used for race simulation
  - race_setup(self): sets up race environment - prepares screen, scales track and initializes horses.
  - update_position(self): updates horse position during race, tracks progress and checks for finish. starts time and applies weather factors.
  - start_race(self): starts race via race_setup and update_position methods
  - get_times(self): returns a dictionary of race times for each horse.
  - get_winning_horse_id(self): returns winning horse ID
- race_results.py
  - __init__(self, race, horses, horse_timings): initialization
  - get_horse_timing_data_frame(self, horse_timings): retrieves data frame with horse times
  - get_horse_position(self, horse_timings, horse_id): finds a horse's position at race stage
  - display_options(self): options for displaying results
  - display_leaderboard(self): displays leaderboard of race results
  - generate_race_summary(self): display the race summary
  - get_horse_performance(self): retrieves performance details for specific horse
  - various supplementary methods were included in this module for ease of functionality in the methods
- betting.py
  - __init__(self, start_balance=1000): initialization
  - race_welcome(self): issues user prompts in order to begin race and proceed
  - run_game(self): consolidates the betting, race results and simulation
  - show_balance(self): shows users current balance
  - take_bet(self, bet, horse_id, horses): user input for bet - if 0 or horse_id invalid, does not accept bets
  - distribute_earnings(self, bet, winning_horse_id, selected_horse_id, odds=2.0): Assesses if selected horse wins race, if wins - adds bet to balance

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.betting.User.__init__

Initializes instance of the 'User' class.

Args:

documentation:
Opening prompt for the game.

Args:
    self : Instance of the class.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.betting.User.run_game
documentation:
Consolidate the betting, race results and simulation into one method.

Args:
    self : Instance of the class.

documentation:
Show user's starting balance for the instance.

Args:
    self : Instance of the class.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.betting.User.take_bet
documentation:
Takes bet from user.

Args:
    self : Instance of the class.
    horses (list) : List of Horse IDs for the current race.

Returns:
    bet (int) : Bet value.
    horse_choice (int) : Horse ID of horse selected by the user.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.betting.User.distribute_earnings
documentation:
Distribute earnings after the race is completed.

Args:
    self : Instance of the class.
    bet (int) : Bet value.
    winning_horse_id (int) : Horse ID of winner of the race.
    selected_horse_id (int) : Horse ID of horse selected by the user.
    odds (int) : Odds of winning, default value set to 2.0.

A class representing a User object.
Methods:
    __init__(): Initializes 'User' instance.
    race_welcome(): Opening prompt for the game.
    run_game(): Consolidate the betting, race results and simulation into one method.
    show_balance(): Show user balance for the instance.
    take_bet(): Takes bet from user.
    distribute_earnings(): Distribute earnings after the race is completed.

Randomly selects track venue and corresponding race distance.

Randomly selects weather factors to apply to horse race and
corresponding impact the selected factor has on horse speed.
Stores details in track_weather.
Args:
   self: track_data
Returns:
   None

documentation:
Prints details about the track venue, distance and track weather
Args:
   self: track_data
Returns:
   None

A class representing horse race track with venue options and weather factors
Methods:
    __init__(): Intializes track data
    create_track(): Establishes track venues
    weather_factor(): Selects weather factor and corresponding impact on race
    get_track_info(): Displays details about venue, distance, and weather

documentation: horse_stats.py

classes.name: horse_race_simulator.race_data.horse_stats.Horse

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.race_data.horse_stats.Horse.__init__
documentation:
Initializes instance of the 'Horse' class.

Args:
    horse_id (int): Horse ID.
    horse_age (int): Horse age.
    actual_weight (int): Actual weight of horse.
    horse_type (str): Horse type such as Colt, Mare, Gelding etc.
    horse_rating (int): Horse rating.
    jockey_id (int): Jockey ID.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.race_data.horse_stats.Horse.create_horse
documentation:
Retreives a subset of horses from the given data set 'csv_filename'.

Args:
    csv_filename: Kaggle data set containing horse data.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.race_data.horse_stats.Horse.update_horse_stats
documentation:
Updates speed of a horse based on factors; horse rating, horse age, actual weight of a horse and uses randomization to ensure that values vary with each simulation.

Args:
    self: Instance of the class.

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.race_data.horse_stats.Horse.get_horse_info
documentation:
Prints out horse information.

Args:
    self: Instance of the class.

A class representing a Horse object.
Methods:
    __init__(): Initializes 'Horse' instance.
    create_horse(): Retreives a subset of horses from the Kaggle data set.
    update_horse_stats(): Updates speed of a horse.
    get_horse_info(): Displays horse details.

retrieves a data frame with the horse times across the race simulation

retrieves a horses position

   horse_id: a specific horse id (that was in the race)
Returns:

documentation:
retrieves a horses position
Parameters:
   self: the race results object
Returns:
   method calls: calls specific methods depending on user input

documentation:
creates a visual display for the horses and their corresponding performance after the race.
Parameters:

Returns:

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_results.RaceResults.generate_race_summary
documentation:
Display the race summary in detail includes attributes previously defined.
Parameters:

Returns:

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_results.RaceResults.get_horse_performance
documentation:
Retrieve performance summary for a specific horse, can be called for every horse in the race

Returns:

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_results.RaceResults.find_horse_by_id
documentation: supplementary methods

class_variables.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_results.RaceResults.track_length
documentation: solely for display purposes

A class representing the results of the race simulation
Methods:
    __init__(): Intializes race result information
    get_horse_timing_data_frame(): retrieves the horse times during the race simulation (legs and overall time)
    get_horse_position(): finding the horse's position (used at various stages of the race)
    display_options(): gives users options to select the displaying of race results
    display_leaderboard(): displays a leaderboard of the race results
    generate_race_summary(): displays a detailed summary of the race
    get_horse_performance(): displays performance details for a specific horse
    get_horse_age(): retrieve horse age
    get_horse_type(): retrieve horse type (breed)
    get_horse_weight(): retrieve horse weight
    get_horse_jockey(): retrieve horse jockey (the person riding the horse)

modules.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator
documentation: race_simulator.py

classes.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.__init__
documentation:
Initializes RaceSimulation
Attributes:
    screen: Generates race screen
    track: Contains venue and weather factors
    horses: Contains horse objects for race
    horse_objects: Objects representing each horse
    finish_line: Establishes finish line on track
    finished_horses: List of horses finishing the race
    start_time: Start time of race
    race_data: Dictionary containing race data
    leg_markers: Marker positions for legs of race
    final_results: Dictionary of final horse race results

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.draw_track
documentation:
Creates track imagery used for race simulation.
Args:
    self: RaceSimulation
    scaled_length (float): Scaled length of the track used to show horse movement during race
Returns:
    None

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.race_setup
documentation:
Sets up the race environment: track, lanes, horses.
Prepares the screen, scales track, and initializes horses. Creates
dictionary to store data generated by race.
Args:
    self: RaceSimulation
Returns:
    None

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.update_position
documentation:
Updates horse position during race, tracks progress and checks
for marker/finish line crossing to update race data. Starts timer
and applies weather factors.
Args:
    self: RaceSimulation
Returns:
    None

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.start_race
documentation:
Starts race by setting up screen and initialization of horse movement
via race_setup and update_position methods.
Args:
    self: RaceSimulation
Returns:
    None

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.get_times
documentation:
Returns a dictionary of race times for each horse
Args:
   self: RaceSimulation
Returns:
   dict: times (Dictionary of horse IDs and leg times from race)

methods.name: horse_race_simulator.simulation.race_simulator.RaceSimulation.get_winning_horse_id
documentation:
Returns winning_horse_id
Args:
    self: RaceSimulation
Returs:
    winning_horse_id: sorted results

A class representing race simulation
Methods:
    __init__(): Initializes simulation
    draw_track(): Creates track imagery
    race_setup(): Sets up screen and horses for race
    update_position(): Moves horses through race
    start_race(): Starts and times race
    get_times(): Returns a dictionary of race times for each horse
    get_winning_horse_id(): Returns winning horse ID
